eth_getCode_entryPointV08_latest.message: method eth_getCode is not implemented by the local YNX devnet RPC

networkObservation: TLS handshakes were intermittent; successful results required IPv4 and bounded retries.
conclusion: The public EVM endpoint proves chainId and advancing block-read capability. It does not expose eth_getCode, so EntryPoint deployment/code presence and ERC-4337 compatibility are unverified.
